utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes: selected_property (maps to property), financing, legal_services, moving_services, property_survey (extra), total_budget. Now check completeness per item: 
- property: Present as selected_property with details and price — fully specified. 
- financing: Present with option, down payment, arrangement fee, notes — reasonably specified as financing solution with terms. 
- legal_services: Present with package and cost — specified. 
- moving_services: Present with moving and cost; also includes utility_setups and cost_utility inside — moving arrangements with costs are specified. 
- setup_services: Required as separate item for utility and setup services. In the solution, utility setups are nested under moving_services, not as a separate setup_services item. Therefore this item is missing as its own entry. 
- total_budget: Present with a cost breakdown — specified. 
Thus, 5 out of 6 required items are covered (setup_services missing as a distinct item).

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes a selected purchase property and several service choices. We must match each named item to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings. The items present are: Historic Townhouse (purchase property), Traditional Mortgage (purchase financing), Premium Legal Package (legal services), Standard Moving (moving services), Basic Utilities (utility setups labeled as Basic utility setups), and Full Structural Survey (property survey). We then extract their corresponding ratings from the ground-truth.
